text: Claude Code v2.1.128 (May 4, 2026) does three small things that matter: --plugin-dir now takes .zip archives, so you can ship a single file instead of a tree. EnterWorktree finally branches from local HEAD, so unpushed commits stop disappearing inside agent runs. And the CLI no longer leaks its own OTEL_* env vars into Bash subprocesses, so your OTel-instrumented .NET apps stop pushing traces to the wrong collector.
